title: My model given trade booked 11,404 points in this big fall.
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
Just wanted to share the recent trade my model executed:

* **Signal date:** 10/11/2025 close (GMT) OR  11/11/2025 open
* **Exit date:** 14/11/2025 close (GMT)
* **Direction:** Short
* **Result:** Captured **+11,404 points** (Entry: $ 105,966→ Exit: $ 94,562)

This one was a big thumbs-up ✅, but of course not every trade is like this. On average, the model does about **5,000–5,500 points per month**.

[](https://preview.redd.it/my-model-booked-6-240-points-in-this-recent-fall-v0-ep7irq18tfyf1.png?width=1800&format=png&auto=webp&s=84478c0545014b2c27998fdd52e4e60304b92414)

For some context:

* Over the last 3 years, the model has **outperformed BTC spot** (no quarter has closed negative).
* This month alone, we’re up **+2,402 points**, while BTC is down by \~15,000 points ($109,608 - $94,562).

Not trying to hype this — just sharing transparent results. If anyone’s interested in how it works, feel free to drop questions here or direct message me. I’m also open to lending the model.

https://preview.redd.it/cvn8l6au9e1g1.png?width=1800&format=png&auto=webp&s=f5ee5a64de6f9812019a3f2a6b7156e31e01f38e
